supported_devices: built-in peristaltic pump for pH dosing; optional Bluelab Connect Stick for remote monitoring
port_types: BNC pH probe, temperature probe, peristaltic pump outlet, USB port for Connect Stick
compatible_sensors: Bluelab pH probe (BNC), Bluelab temperature probe
recommended_use_note: pH dosing with optional remote data logging via Bluelab Connect ecosystem; single-direction control; Connect Stick sold separately
uvp_notes: Bluelab EMEA official price €655 (incl. VAT) per search-result snippet; EMEA page returned 404 at time of fetch. growshop-germany.de lists at €690 incl. 19% VAT.
notes: Model CONTPHCON. Built-in 10 ml/min peristaltic pump; single-direction pH dosing (up OR down, user-selectable). pH range 0.1-13.9, resolution 0.1, accuracy ±0.1 at 25°C. Reservoirs up to 200 US gallons / 760 L. Wireless connectivity requires separately purchased Bluelab Connect Stick (2.4 GHz ISM, proprietary protocol; indoor range up to 20 m, outdoor up to 50 m); data logging and remote monitoring via free Bluelab Connect PC/mobile software. Connect Stick is NOT included — Amazon.de listing title confirms 'Excludes Connect Stick'. Wall-mount, water-resistant. International power supply (100-240V AC). 2 m probe cable, 4 m acid/alkali-resistant dosing tube. 2-year device warranty, 6-month pH probe warranty. Made in New Zealand.
